description:
Goal
Introduce stage-specific domain types that attach `ModulePlan` to the exact IR module it describes and establish the vocabulary for units, linked whole-program IR, and native-lowered IR.

Signal
- There is one reusable type for an IR module plus its authoritative plan.
- Existing stage structs stop carrying raw `Module` / `ModulePlan` pairs directly.
- Naming across compiler/pipeline/codegen reflects stage semantics rather than generic modules.
title: Data model: introduce planned IR/value objects
